title: Sweet Ginger & Lime Reed Diffuser - Clyde Candles, Luxury Diffuser Oil with a Set of 7 Fibre Sticks, Best Aroma Scent for Home, Kitchen, Living Room, Bathroom. Fragrance Diffusers set with sticks
features: Last up to 3 months, Best Aroma Scent for Home, Kitchen, Living Room, Bathroom.
100ml scented oil' with 7 diffuser sticks in a luxury gift box.
Small British family run company - Hand Made in Scotland, UK
Perfect Gift Idea – this is the ideal gift for friends and family for any occasion. (It’s the perfect choice for weddings, Housewarmings, Bridal showers, Birthdays, Christmas)
description: Product description SWEET GINGER & LIME REED DIFFUSER Product Description Our Sweet Ginger & Lime diffuser fills the room with a clean & refreshing fragrance of ginger, juicy limes & tangy lemongrass. An absolutely gorgeous scent. Our luxury diffusers are hand crafted in Scotland from the highest quality fragrance oils. They add a decorative touch to any room and fill the home with up to three months of luxurious scents. Clyde Candles We are a small Scottish family run business and we are located on the North Bank of the River Clyde in Clydebank. Here at Clyde Candles all our candles are crafted using only natural soy wax and the highest quality oils and there all hand made in our small workshop in Clydebank. All our wax, fragrance oils & essential oils are completely vegan and cruelty-free. We also make sure that no colour dye is used in our candles. From beautiful highly scented candles to more luxurious reed diffusers, we have a scent for every home. Being Sustainable Our soy wax is 100% natural, a renewable and sustainable resource minimising the effect on the eco system. Our wicks are made from cotton and linen thread, no lead. All our glasses and tins are recyclable. All our orders are dispatched in recycled/recyclable cardboard. We try to recycle all our waste. And all plastic we receive we try to recycle. 95% of all our packaging is recyclable and we try our hardest to work on the rest. Directions Fill the diffuser with the scented oil and let it diffuse for up to three months; enhance your space with a luxurious long-lasting luxury fragrance. Safety Warning Caution: May cause irritation or allergic reactions when in contact with the skin. Use the product in well-ventilated rooms. Keep the product out of reach of children and pets.
